MeghRoop
Social Brand System

Platform-optimised assets — profile pictures, banners, and cover images — built from the same design tokens as the website. Space Grotesk 700 · dark-mode native · one cohesive identity.

LinkedIn X / Twitter GitHub Instagram Facebook YouTube WhatsApp Zoom / Meet OG Image Email Signature Letterhead Business Card Wallpaper Brand Reference Do's & Don'ts Usage Guidelines
LinkedIn
Profile picture 400×400 · Banner 1584×396
Profile Picture
400 × 400 px
Cover Banner
1584 × 396 px

Safe zone: LinkedIn overlays your profile picture (approx. 250×250) on the bottom-left of the banner. Keep key content in the horizontal centre and upper half.

X / Twitter
Profile picture 400×400 · Header 1500×500
Profile Picture
400 × 400 px
Header Image
1500 × 500 px

Safe zone: Mobile crops to approx. 1500×500 centred. Profile circle sits bottom-left. Content in the centre 900px horizontal band is safe across all devices.

GitHub
Profile picture 460×460 · README banner 1280×640
Profile Picture
460 × 460 px
README Banner
1280 × 640 px

Usage: Place at the top of your profile README.md as ![MeghRoop](./banner.png). GitHub renders at full column width (~840px desktop).

Instagram
Profile picture 320×320 · Square post 1080×1080 · Highlight cover 1000×1000
Profile Picture
320 × 320 px
Square Post
1080 × 1080 px
Highlight Cover
1000 × 1000 px

Post: Feed posts display at up to 1080×1080. Keep text within 80px margins to avoid cropping. Highlight: Displayed as circle ~150px on profile; centre your icon content.

Facebook
Profile picture 400×400 · Cover photo 820×312
Profile Picture
400 × 400 px
Cover Photo
820 × 312 px

Safe zone: Facebook overlays your profile picture (approx. 168×168) on the bottom-left of the cover. Keep key content away from the bottom-left corner and edges.

YouTube
Profile picture 800×800 · Channel art 2560×1440
Profile Picture
800 × 800 px
Channel Art
2560 × 1440 px

Safe zones: TV displays full 2560×1440. Desktop shows centre 1546×423. Mobile shows centre 1235×338. All content is placed within the tightest mobile-safe zone.

WhatsApp
DP 500×500 · Status 1080×1920
Display Picture
500 × 500 px
Status / Story
1080 × 1920 px

Safe zone: Keep key content in the centre 1080×1350 area — top and bottom 285px may be cropped by WhatsApp UI.

Zoom / Meet Background
1920 × 1080 px · virtual background for video calls
Virtual Background
1920 × 1080 px · PNG

How to use: In Zoom → Settings → Backgrounds & Effects → Add (+) → choose this file. In Google Meet → More options → Apply visual effects → Upload.

OG Image
Open Graph · 1200 × 630 px · used for link previews on WhatsApp, Twitter, LinkedIn
Open Graph Image
1200 × 630 px · PNG
↓ PNG

Usage: This image appears when sharing meghroop.tech on WhatsApp, Telegram, Twitter, LinkedIn, and other platforms that support Open Graph previews.

Email Signature
HTML · email-client compatible · 2 co-founders · light & dark
Meghansh Agarwal · Co-Founder
HTML · paste directly in Gmail / Outlook

How to use: Click Copy HTML → in Gmail go to Settings → General → Signature → paste. In Outlook, insert as HTML. Update social links with your actual profile URLs before use.

Letterhead
HTML template · proposals, emails, official documents · Light & Dark
Letterhead — Light
HTML · copy into your document or email

How to use: Copy HTML and paste into Gmail (compose → insert HTML), Notion, or any rich text editor. Replace the placeholder content area with your actual document text.

Business Card
3.5 × 2 in · 1050 × 600 px · Front & Back · Light & Dark
Front
1050 × 600 px
Back
1050 × 600 px

Print spec: 3.5 × 2 inch at 300 DPI · Add 3mm bleed when sending to a print shop · CMYK conversion recommended for physical print.

Typography Scale

Style Preview Size Weight Letter-spacing Usage
page-title MeghRoop clamp(28,5vw,44px) 700 −0.04em Page headings
wordmark MeghRoop variable (canvas) 700 −0.042em Logo / brand mark

body We build it. 14px 400 +0.01em Subtitles, taglines

Logo Clear Space

Minimum breathing room around the logo. Never place text, images, or other elements inside the clear space zone.

Clear space = 1× cap-height on all four sides. For the M-mark alone, minimum clear space = 0.5× mark height.

Do's & Don'ts
Correct and incorrect logo usage — visual guide

✓ Do — Correct Usage

✓ Correct
Use logo on dark brand background with clear space
✓ Correct
Use logo on clean white/light background
✓ Correct
M-mark alone — on dark bg, with breathing room

✗ Don't — Incorrect Usage

✗ Don't
Don't stretch or distort the logo proportions
✗ Don't
Don't rotate or tilt the logo
✗ Don't
Don't recolor — use only approved brand colors
✗ Don't
Don't add drop shadows, outlines, or glow effects
✗ Don't
Don't place on low-contrast or busy backgrounds
✗ Don't
Don't crowd — always maintain minimum clear space
Trademark & Usage Guidelines
Read before using any MeghRoop brand asset
  • Written Authorization Required
    Use of any MeghRoop brand asset — logo, wordmark, M-mark, or name — must be expressly authorized in writing. Downloading assets from this page does not constitute permission to use them publicly.
  • Permitted Uses
    You may use our brand assets when: writing about MeghRoop in editorial or press context, referring to our products or services accurately, or in cases where we have provided explicit written approval. Where used on a web page, our name and logo should include a hyperlink to meghroop.tech.
  • Prohibited Uses
    Do not use our brand assets in any way that: implies sponsorship, affiliation, or endorsement by MeghRoop without authorization · modifies, distorts, or combines our logo with other marks · associates our brand with illegal, deceptive, or harmful activities · misrepresents our products, services, or identity in any form.
  • Visual Integrity
    Our brand assets must always be reproduced faithfully. Do not alter colors, proportions, typography, or spacing. Always maintain the minimum clear space around the logo (see Brand Reference above). Do not place the logo on visually competing or low-contrast backgrounds.
  • Ownership & Goodwill
    MeghRoop brand assets are our exclusive property. All goodwill generated through your use of our brand assets belongs solely to MeghRoop. You will not take any action that conflicts with our rights or ownership of these assets.
  • Termination
    Any use of MeghRoop brand assets in violation of these guidelines will result in automatic termination of your license or permission to use them. MeghRoop reserves the right to request the removal of any unauthorized usage at any time.
Questions? For press kits, partnership usage, or written authorization requests — reach out at hello@meghroop.tech. By downloading or using any asset from this page you acknowledge that you have read and agree to these guidelines.
